reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The output is missing a massive amount of content from the source PDF. Entire sections and pages are absent, including the Contents (Page 2), Vision, Mission and Priorities (Page 5), Enterprise Functions and Divisions (Pages 6-8), and the Awards and Recognitions chapter (Pages 33-40). The output explicitly includes a metadata entry '_omitted': '32 sections omitted for token budget', which confirms the absence of significant portions of the document.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Table of Contents (Page 2), Vision, Mission and Priorities (Page 5), Enterprise Functions and Divisions (Pages 6-8), Awards and Recognitions (Pages 33-40).
concerns.output_quote: The output jumps from 'About NCDIT' (Page 4) to 'Budget Report' (Page 14), and from 'Goals' (terminating at Page 22) to 'NC.gov Delivers a Frictionless Customer and Citizen Digital Experience' (Page 41).
concerns.location: Sections between element index 4 and 17, and between 18 and 39.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: The 'Goals' section in the source PDF spans pages 16 to 32. The output conversion for this section stops after the content found on page 22. It omits significant subsections such as 'Customer Experience for other Agencies', 'Optimize and Secure...', 'Promote an Inclusive...', 'Data Linking', 'Data Analysis Solutions', 'Privacy', and 'Health Care', which comprise more than half of the chapter's content.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Content from pages 23 ('Customer Experience for other Agencies') through 32 ('Health Care').
concerns.output_quote: The section 'Goals' (reading_order 18) ends with the 'Emerging Technologies' content from page 22.

concerns.analysis: There is a major content duplication issue. The entire report content is rendered once in the primary styled layout and then repeated in its entirety as a plain text block at the bottom of the page. This second instance includes everything from the cover page titles and Table of Contents through to the final 'Looking Ahead' section paragraphs.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The N.C. Department of Information Technology adopted a new strategic plan for fiscal years 2021-23. This plan outlines our five key goals we are working toward to carry out our mission to enable trusted business-driven solutions that meet the needs of North Carolinians.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML screenshot and OCR text show the entire document content starting over from '2021/2022 Annual Report' and the 'Secretary's Message' text immediately following the end of the primary 'Looking Ahead' section (page 41).
concerns.location: End of the HTML document, following the final page 41 footer.

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
